question: What text is displayed on the black rectangular box positioned behind the jewelry in the opening scenes? A. BOSS B. DIY JEWELRY POUCH C. Le Bain D. POP COMPANY

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with long blonde hair wearing a black and white striped shirt stands behind a wooden table. She handles leather drawstring pouches in red, teal, and beige colors while gesturing with her hands. Two black leather sofas flank a white fireplace mantel and built-in bookshelves filled with books in the background. Gold jewelry and textured material swatches are displayed on white surfaces alongside the pouches.

Woman with long blonde hair wearing a black and white horizontal striped shirt C. Leopard print fabric drawstring pouch with a pink ribbon bow D. Teal drawstring pouch with beige ribbon drawstrings

Describe the sequence of actions performed with the jewelry pouches and the presenter's movements throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a woman wearing a striped shirt waves her right hand; at 4s, hands pull pink ribbons to cinch a red leather pouch closed; at 10s, hands pull drawstrings on a teal pouch while the woman stands; at 14s, three pouches sit on a wooden table; at 16s, a title card reading DIY JEWELRY POUCH appears on screen.

What does the woman do with the teal circular object she is holding?
canonical_answer: She uses a hole punch to create holes around the edge of the teal circle.
